hypothesis: Aromatic/hydrophobic residues at positions 5-6 and 11 will improve binding affinity through enhanced hydrophobic interactions and π-π stacking with SSTR2's aromatic residues

critic_feedback_used.hypothesis: Initial hypothesis underestimated the magnitude of required stability improvements for SSTR2 binding.

proposed_changes.rationale: Current threshold rejects candidates with significantly better stability (ddG=-37.2 vs -5.0).
Reduce clash tolerance to prioritize structural integrity in docking interactions.
